category_sources: source_facts.description: all-in-one NES/Famicom emulator; official documentation says FCEUX plays NES and Famicom Disk System games.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fceux`; official site and repository use the display name FCEUX.
docs_sources: Official FCEUX site provides documentation and online help pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provided; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official help pages identify NES/Famicom emulation, TAS/movie features, and debugging tools.
